items.title: Align mountsea veo with cqtai schema in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update aligns the mountsea veo handler with the cqtai schema, ensuring consistent behavior with external APIs. Key changes include corrected model mapping, adjustments to the get1080p endpoint, and the removal of unnecessary fields in the payload. Additionally, new methods for billing defaults and metadata have been added, enhancing functionality and clarity.

items.title: Enhance Desktop Agent UI for Better Connectivity in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new Desktop Agent connection manager UI, enhancing user experience by displaying connection status and installation instructions. The integration includes a button in the chat toolbar that indicates connectivity with a green dot. Additionally, internationalization support has been added for English and Chinese, ensuring accessibility for a broader audience.

items.title: Skip Billing for Desktop Agent Endpoints in Gateway 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces billing exemptions for two desktop agent endpoints: the status check and WebSocket. Specifically, the endpoints `/aichat2/agent` and `/aichat2/ws/agent` will not incur any AI resource charges. This change enhances management efficiency without impacting resource consumption.

items.title: Exciting New WebSocket Infrastructure and CLI for Desktop Agent in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a robust WebSocket infrastructure for the desktop agent, enabling seamless connections and command execution. Key features include a new WebSocket endpoint, connection management, and a Node.js CLI package for local tool integration. These enhancements significantly improve the interaction between local agents and the cloud orchestrator.

items.title: Fix NanoBanana API to Use Aspect Ratio Instead of Size in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update resolves the issue with the Mountsea NanoBanana channel, which was previously broken due to an API schema change. The `size` field has been replaced with `aspect_ratio` in the relevant code, ensuring compatibility with the upstream API. This fix will restore functionality for generating and editing requests across all models and resolutions.
